itinerary.title: Canton, GA to Little Rock, AR (Hotel 1)
itinerary.target: Establish a clean baseline run moving west while managing standard highway transit

legs.name: Morning Stretch
legs.route_details: Canton, GA → 1855 US-72, Huntsville, AL 35811 (153 miles, approx. 3 hrs 0 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Clean initial leg departing right after peak local traffic. Plan a 30-minute staging and fueling break upon arrival.

legs.name: Midday Run
legs.route_details: 1855 US-72, Huntsville, AL 35811 → 4356 Forest Hill Irene Rd, Memphis, TN 38125 (213 miles, approx. 3 hrs 55 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Direct highway transit corridor heading west. Plan a 30-minute lunch and fuel break.
legs.destination_address: 4356 Forest Hill Irene Road, Memphis, TN 38125

legs.name: Evening Stretch
legs.route_details: 4356 Forest Hill Irene Rd, Memphis, TN 38125 → 4900 Talley Road, Little Rock, AR 72204 (137 miles, approx. 2 hrs 10 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Final leg crossing the Mississippi River into Arkansas, landing safely ahead of the evening rush at the Day 1 hotel destination to set up for Day 2's early 06:00 AM departure.
legs.start_address: 4356 Forest Hill Irene Road, Memphis, TN 38125

itinerary.title: Little Rock, AR to Tucumcari, NM (Hotel 2)
itinerary.target: Clear Oklahoma City bottleneck during the mid-day commuter dead zone.

legs.name: Morning Stretch
legs.route_details: 4900 Talley Rd, Little Rock, AR → 903 E Trudgeon St, Henryetta, OK (248 miles, 3 hrs 35 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Early departure avoids local Little Rock morning commuter buildup. Plan a 30-minute staging and fueling break upon arrival.

legs.name: Midday Run
legs.route_details: 903 E Trudgeon St, Henryetta, OK → 301 S 4th St, Sayre, OK (218 miles, 3 hrs 12 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Passes through the heart of Oklahoma City at approximately 11:15 AM, hitting the optimal lunch-hour lull. Plan a 30-minute break.

legs.name: Evening Stretch
legs.route_details: 301 S 4th St, Sayre, OK → 1901 S Mountain Rd, Tucumcari, NM (239 miles, 3 hrs 27 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Straightforward tracking along I-40 W directly into the Day 2 overnight hotel location.

itinerary.title: Tucumcari, NM to Flagstaff, AZ (Hotel 3)
itinerary.target: Traverse Albuquerque and the complex 'Big I' interchange smoothly after peak morning hours.

legs.name: Morning Stretch
legs.route_details: 1901 S Mountain Rd, Tucumcari, NM → 650 Juan Tabo Blvd NE, Albuquerque, NM (167 miles, 2 hrs 25 mins)
legs.operational_notes: A slightly delayed departure allows Albuquerque's morning rush hour to dissolve entirely before your arrival. 30-minute fueling break.
legs.destination_address: 650 Juan Tabo Boulevard NE, Albuquerque, NM

legs.name: Midday Run
legs.route_details: 650 Juan Tabo Blvd NE, Albuquerque, NM → 3540 E Historic Hwy 66, Gallup, NM (141 miles, 2 hrs 3 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Navigates the multi-lane highway splits of the city during clear mid-day traffic. Plan a 30-minute break.
legs.start_address: 650 Juan Tabo Boulevard NE, Albuquerque, NM

legs.name: Evening Stretch
legs.route_details: 3540 E Historic Hwy 66, Gallup, NM → 2015 S Beulah Blvd, Flagstaff, AZ (191 miles, 2 hrs 45 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Final drive into the Flagstaff hotel. Note: If traveling during Daylight Saving Time, crossing into Arizona will gain 1 hour, shifting local arrival to 02:43 PM.

itinerary.title: Flagstaff, AZ to Tehachapi, CA (Hotel 4)
itinerary.target: Steady desert transit with standard highway parameters. No major city bottlenecks.

legs.name: Morning Stretch
legs.route_details: 2015 S Beulah Blvd, Flagstaff, AZ → 6035 E Minerva Ln, Kingman, AZ (136 miles, 1 hr 58 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Scenic, open drive descending down the I-40 W corridor. Plan a 30-minute fuel stop.

legs.name: Midday Run
legs.route_details: 6035 Minerva Ln, Kingman, AZ → 491 Armory Rd, Barstow, CA (215 miles, 3 hrs 23 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Sustained open desert transit segment. Ensure communication channels remain open. Plan a 30-minute break.

legs.name: Evening Stretch
legs.route_details: 491 Armory Rd, Barstow, CA → 422 W Tehachapi Blvd, Tehachapi, CA (90 miles, 1 hr 28 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Short final leg transitioning cleanly off I-40 onto CA-58 W toward the Tehachapi mountain hotel.

itinerary.title: Tehachapi, CA to Redding, CA (Hotel 5)
itinerary.target: Traverse the highly congested Sacramento metro region perfectly between rush hours.

legs.name: Morning Stretch
legs.route_details: 422 W Tehachapi Blvd, Tehachapi, CA → 12754 CA-33, Santa Nella, CA (213 miles, 3 hrs 18 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Early departure is essential to align the 5-hour journey to Sacramento with the midday low-volume window. 30-minute fuel stop.

legs.name: Midday Run
legs.route_details: 12754 CA-33, Santa Nella, CA → 690 Hillgate Rd, Arbuckle, CA (159 miles, 2 hrs 27 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Passes directly through the center of Sacramento at approximately 12:15 PM, dodging complex multi-lane commuter congestion. 30-minute break.

legs.name: Evening Stretch
legs.route_details: 690 Hillgate Rd, Arbuckle, CA → 1195 Grand Ave, Redding, CA (116 miles, 1 hr 46 mins)
legs.operational_notes: Clear, low-density rural drive northward up the Sacramento Valley to the final hotel.

itinerary.title: Redding, CA to Canyonville, OR (Home)
itinerary.target: Secure optimal visibility and warmer road conditions through mountain passes.

legs.name: Final Leg
legs.route_details: 1195 Grand Ave, Redding, CA → 561 SE Mill St, Canyonville, OR (215 miles, 3 hrs 33 mins)
legs.operational_notes: No urban gridlock risks. Leaving at 09:00 AM maximizes daylight safety, thermal road traction, and line-of-sight visibility over the mountain grades back home.
